name: finn
desc: A weathered middle-aged fisherman with a sun-lined face, graying stubble, and calm heavy-lidded eyes wearing a contentedly unimpressed expression. He wears an olive-green bucket hat, a worn sea-blue fisherman's coat, and tan waders with shoulder straps visible at the chest.
sheetHint: same weathered stubbled face, olive bucket hat, sea-blue coat, tan waders

expressions.happy: a small reluctant smile tugging at one corner of his mouth, eyes softened
expressions.puzzled: one eyebrow raised high, the other flat, mouth skewed to one side in mild bafflement
expressions.hollow: an emptied look — eyes unfocused and distant, face slack, all the quiet contentment gone
